mapper.select: select film.*, category.name as categoryName from film left join category on film.category_id = category.id where film.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into film(name, cover, description, year, director, actors, category_id, country, language, date, duration, imdb) values (#{name}, #{cover}, #{description}, #{year}, #{director}, #{actors}, #{categoryId}, #{country}, #{language}, #{date}, #{duration}, #{imdb})
mapper.update: update film set name = #{name}, cover=#{cover}, description=#{description}, year=#{year}, director=#{director}, actors=#{actors}, category_id=#{categoryId}, country=#{country}, language=#{language}, date=#{date}, duration=#{duration}, imdb=#{imdb} where id = #{id}
